expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: No skill invocation — this is the without_skill baseline.

expectations.name: vagueness_detected
expectations.text: Agent identifies that architecture characteristics lack concrete, measurable goals
expectations.evidence: Agent noted in retrospective that characteristics were vague, but did NOT flag this to the user before proceeding. Self-assessed: 'I did NOT ask the user to clarify the vague characteristics before creating tests.'

expectations.name: no_invented_thresholds
expectations.text: Agent does NOT invent arbitrary thresholds (like picking 80% coverage without it being specified)
expectations.evidence: Agent invented arbitrary thresholds: 100ms for performance, 50 lines for function length, 500 lines for file size, 4 levels max nesting, 300 lines for scalability. Self-assessed: 'The thresholds I chose are arbitrary defaults with no architectural justification.'

expectations.name: asks_or_escalates
expectations.text: Agent asks for clarification or escalates with NEEDS_CONTEXT/BLOCKED status
expectations.evidence: Agent proceeded to create all fitness functions without asking for clarification. Self-assessed: 'A better approach would have been to flag that these are unmeasurable as stated.'

expectations.name: no_broken_functions
expectations.text: Agent does NOT create fitness functions with made-up pass criteria
expectations.evidence: Created 4 test files with 16 tests, all using invented thresholds. Self-assessed: 'The fitness functions are generic best-practice checks rather than project-specific architectural guardrails.'
